use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in web applications
Color-coded action buttons in dashboards and admin panels
Interactive form submission triggers with visual feedback
ai_summary: Tom UI Pop Button is a versatile, colorful button component with a neobrutalist-inspired thick-border design and satisfying press animation. Features 23 color variants and three size options, making it ideal for SaaS dashboards, e-commerce interfaces, and fintech applications requiring prominent interactive elements.
